                +------+
              +-+  T1  |<--+
              | +------+   |
              |            |
+--------+    | +------+   |      +----------+
|  Sink  |<---+-+  T2  |<--+------+  Source  |
+--------+    | +------+   |      +----------+
              |            |
              | +------+   |
              +-+  T3  |<--+
                +------+
